calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq. KLEIN LAW GROUP Tel. (415) 693-9107 for Plaintiff
Leiann Laiks, Esq. FUSION LAW GROUP Tel. (415) 625-3953 for Defendant
Matt Metzger, Esq. BELVEDERE LEGAL (415) 513-5980 for Defendant

Counsel meet the Court in chambers together and separately to discuss the settlement of the case.

Case is settled. The settlement is as follows:

Defendant SARAI, Inc. will make payment of $14,000 in three installments.
1) $5000 due by 5pm on 9/30/14
2) $5000 due by 5pm on 10/15/14
3) $5000 due by 5pm on 11/15/14

Payable to Plaintiff's counsel, KLEIN LAW GROUP, by cashier's check
If payment is not made timely, defendant must provide 5-day notice.
Counsel has stipulated an amount of $30000 will be issued with failure to pay.

Request for dismissal is without prejudice.
The Court orders the Mutual confidentiality agreement.

Judge Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Rosallie Gumpal; Reporter: Not reported. (D306)

Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alexei Kuchinsky, of Klein Law Group, Tel. 415.693.9107, for plaintiffs and moving party;
No other appearances.

PLAINTIFF LISA BERNARD Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants' Production Of Documents is GRANTED. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is GRANTED. Sanctions in the amount of $500 are awarded against Defendant Sarai, Inc. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
